Class ConditionExpression

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.ConditionExpression
public final class ConditionExpression extends Object
A typed wrapper around a condition expression for DynamoDB pre-write gating (PutItem, UpdateItem, DeleteItem, TransactWriteItems condition checks).

This is semantically distinct from a FilterExpression, which is used for post-read filtering on Query/Scan operations. DynamoDB treats these as separate expression types, see the DynamoDB Developer Guide for details.

Internally delegates to a FilterExpression for the actual expression building logic, but presents a distinct type in the public API to prevent accidental misuse of filter expressions where condition expressions are expected, and vice versa.

    isEmpty()
    Returns whether no conditions have been added to this expression yet.
    @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.Expression

    Converts this condition expression into an AWS SDK Expression for use with enhanced client request builders.

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static ConditionExpression from(@NonNull FilterExpression filterExpression)
      Wraps a FilterExpression as a ConditionExpression for typed API use. Useful for migrating existing code that builds expressions using FilterExpression.
      Parameters:
      filterExpression - the filter expression to wrap
      Returns:
      a new condition expression backed by the given filter expression

    • toSdkExpression

      public @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.Expression toSdkExpression()
      Converts this condition expression into an AWS SDK Expression for use with enhanced client request builders.
      Returns:
      the SDK expression

    • getExpression

      public @NonNull String getExpression()
      Returns the built condition expression string.
      Returns:
      the expression string

    • getExpressionNames

      public @NonNull Map<String,String> getExpressionNames()
      Returns the map of expression attribute names used in this expression.
      Returns:
      the expression attribute names map

    • getExpressionValues

      public @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.AttributeValue> getExpressionValues()
      Returns the map of expression attribute values used in this expression.
      Returns:
      the expression attribute values map

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns whether no conditions have been added to this expression yet.
      Returns:
      true if the expression is empty, false otherwise

    • builder

      public static @NonNull ConditionExpression.Builder builder()
      Creates a new builder for constructing a ConditionExpression.
      Returns:
      a new builder
